overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic city plaza during an intense orange dust storm. The player navigates past monolith structures, ascends a stairway, and explores an elevated walkway with digital displays and neon-lit canopies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with monolith art installation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dust-filled plaza toward the monolith structures ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking in same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with 'NICOLA' text and beverage advertisement
series of tall dark rectangular stone pillars arranged in a grid pattern
tall building with blue neon 'HOTEL' signage on the facade
modern street lamp with illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dust-filled urban plaza lined with tall dark monoliths. The Nicola billboard stands on the left while a neon Hotel sign glows on the right building. Pedestrians walk through the hazy orange atmosphere across the paved ground.

events.description: turning left and beginning to ascend the wide outdoor stairway structure
emerging from the sheltered stairwell into brighter diffused light at the top

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs alongside other pedestrians, moving from the lower plaza to the upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow vest ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple flights leading upward
turquoise-colored metal handrails lining both sides of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Turning toward and ascending a wide outdoor stairway with teal railings. The surrounding buildings block some of the dust storm as the camera climbs upward with other pedestrians, leaving the monolith plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with digital installations

events.description: exiting stairway onto upper plaza featuring futuristic digital benches and overhead canopy

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, passing digital displays and other pedestrians in the dust storm

entered.detail: futuristic angular benches with large integrated LED screens displaying colorful abstract patterns
geometric metal framework canopy with translucent panels and colored lighting
large vertical digital advertisement showing a woman's face with pink text
second stairway structure with golden-yellow siding visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated pedestrian walkway featuring futuristic digital benches with colorful displays and a geometric overhead canopy. The area is lined with holographic advertisements and palm trees visible through the haze, with another stair structure appearing ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dust-choked urban plaza that ascends into a high-tech elevated walkway. It begins by navigating a hazy orange atmosphere across paved ground, passing between towering dark monoliths and glowing neon signs for a hotel and Nicola. As the camera turns, it climbs a wide outdoor stairway with teal railings, gradually leaving the open plaza behind as the surrounding buildings provide a partial shield from the storm. The scene then opens onto a futuristic pedestrian walkway, where the environment shifts to include geometric overhead canopies and digital benches with colorful displays. Finally, the view expands to reveal holographic advertisements and palm trees shimmering through the orange haze before approaching another stair structure ahead.
